allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; [print\(json.loads\(l\).get\('message',{}\).get\('content',''\)[:500] if isinstance\(json.loads\(l\).get\('message',{}\).get\('content',''\), str\) else ''\) for l in sys.stdin if l.strip\(\)]")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\({k:d[k] for k in ['scripts','engines'] if k in d}, indent=2\)\)")
